properties.name: Tetillas (Cerro de la Antena)
properties.description: hield volcano west of Quinceo, produced by calm lava eruption about 560 thousand years ago; gentle broad slopes.

properties.name: Atécuaro caldera
properties.description: Large collapse caldera ~6 km wide, formed by major explosive eruptions 19.4–16.3 million years ago. Ignite used for stone in Morelia.

properties.name: Punhuato
properties.description: Andesitic volcanic dome formed by a calm eruption about 16.3 million years ago. It is linked to the late volcanic activity of the Atécuaro caldera and shows no historical eruptions.
